title: OCW-PW: Open Courseware Pemrograman Web
description:
OCW-PW is an open courseware platform for the Pemrograman Web (Web Programming) course at Universitas IPWIJA, Jakarta, Indonesia.

The courseware covers 16 structured modules across 4 curriculum parts, guiding students from HTML5 boilerplate through Single Page Application architecture. The culminating project is Niura Article System — a fully functional CMS built entirely in Vanilla JavaScript with zero external dependencies.

Curriculum Structure

  • Part 1 — Fondasi & Antarmuka (P1–P4): HTML5 semantics, CSS3 Flexbox/Grid/Variables, modal and toast components.
  • Part 2 — JavaScript & Logika UI (P5–P8): DOM manipulation, event listeners, renderTable(), input validation, UTS (midterm).
  • Part 3 — Data, Storage & Async (P9–P12): ES6+ Object/Array, JSON, LocalStorage persistence, Fetch API with hydration pattern.
  • Part 4 — CRUD Penuh & Finalisasi (P13–P16): Full Update & Delete, SPA navigation, Final Review, UAS (final exam).

Technical Stack

  • Runtime: Vanilla JavaScript ES6+ — no Node.js, no Webpack, no Babel.
  • Framework: DonatJS — zero-dependency, no-build-step, JSON-driven micro-framework.
  • Content format: All lecture content defined as structured JavaScript objects (pages.learn) — no CMS backend required.
  • Features: Integrated quiz engine (btoa-encoded answer keys), certificate verifier, prev/next module navigation with full-read modal.

Repository

https://github.com/sismadi/ocw-pw

references.title: DonatJS: Perancangan Framework MVC Zero-Dependency untuk Implementasi LMS Berbasis Static-First Architecture
